purpose: Map cargo profiles to required road vehicle types and determine when standard limits or abnormal-load permits become hard gates.
known_limitations: EU Directive 96/53/EC is a baseline; national rules, road classes and local permits may differ.
Actual axle loads, center of gravity, securement method and route survey are not computed in static v1.
Abnormal permit fees and live lead times are out of scope.
Vehicle dimensions vary by carrier equipment; this block maps readiness category, not exact fleet availability.
UK abnormal-load thresholds are included as verified examples but are not generalized as EU law.
